system: small-strain linear elastic bar in axial extension coordinate
coordinate_note: The coordinate is total axial extension, not strain. If strain epsilon = delta_L / L0 is used as the coordinate, the Hessian changes to E_young A_cross L0.
positive_scope: This card exposes material stiffness as the same scalar quadratic contact type as an ideal spring after geometry is declared.
boundary: It does not describe plastic deformation, nonlinear elasticity, bending modes, shear, damping, or fracture.
